text:
うむ、素晴らしい経験を
積むことが出来たようじゃな。

報告を見るまでもない。
お主の表情に、自信が見て取れる。

自信は、技術を高める上で
不可欠であり、重要なものじゃ。

自分ならば創れる、という
一見うぬぼれのような自信こそ
時に革新をもたらす。

お主はその第一歩を踏み出したのじゃ。
ようこそ

Hm, yes.
It seems you've gained incredible experience.

I don't even need to look at the report--I can
see the confidence on your face.

Having confidence is pivotal when developing a
skill. Don't forget the importance of that.

Being confident that you can make something is
exactly the kind of arrogance that spurs
innovation.

You've made your first step towards exactly
that. Welcome to the realm of Crafting.
